sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare('SELECT ID FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'social_users` WHERE type = %s AND identifier = %s', array(
            $this->dbID,
            $identifier
        )))

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare('SELECT identifier FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'social_users` WHERE type = %s AND ID = %s', array(
            $this->dbID,
            $user_id
        )))

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare('SELECT identifier FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'social_users` WHERE type LIKE %s AND ID = %d', array(
            $this->dbID,
            $current_user->ID
        )))

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare('SELECT identifier FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'social_users` WHERE type LIKE %s AND ID = %d', array(
            $this->dbID,
            $user_id
        )))
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = '" . DB_NAME . "' AND TABLE_NAME = '" . $table_name . "' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'social_users_id';")
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = '" . DB_NAME . "' AND TABLE_NAME = '" . $table_name . "' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'register_date';")

sinks.expression: printf(__('%s needs json_decode function.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'Nextend Social Login')
printf(__('%s detected that your login url changed. You must update the Oauth redirect URIs in the related social applications.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'Nextend Social Login')

printf(__('%1$s and %2$s are not compatible. Please update %1$s to version %3$s or newer.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), "Nextend Social Login", "Nextend Social Login Pro Addon", NextendSocialLoginPRO::$nslMinVersion)

printf(__('%1$s and %2$s are not compatible. Please update %2$s to version %3$s or newer.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), "Nextend Social Login", "Nextend Social Login Pro Addon", NextendSocialLogin::$nslPROMinVersion)
printf(__('The features below are available in %s Pro Addon. Get it today and tweak the awesome settings.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), "Nextend Social Login")
printf(__('Creates a new tab called %s, where the Link and Unlink buttons will be displayed.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), __('Social Accounts', 'nextend-facebook-connect'))

printf(__('Defines whether the registration with %1$s will send the same welcome notification that %2$s does, instead of the %3$s default one.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'Nextend Social Login', 'BuddyPress', 'WordPress')

printf(__('You need to turn on the \' %1$s > %2$s > %3$s \' for this feature to work', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), __('Settings'), __('Discussion'), __('Users must be registered and logged in to comment'))
printf(__('Providers linked to the account will appear in the %1$s.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), ' ' . __('Users table', 'nextend-facebook-connect') . '')

printf(__('Enabling this option will add a GET parameter to the URL where we redirect after a successful registration or login with social login. %1$sLearn more%2$s.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), '', '')

printf(__('%2$s First create a new page and insert the following shortcode: %1$s then select this page above', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), '[nextend_social_login_register_flow]', '' . __("Usage:", "nextend-facebook-connect") . '')
printf(__('%1$s You won\'t be able to reach the selected page unless a social login/registration happens.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), '' . __("Important:", "nextend-facebook-connect") . '')
printf(__('%1$s First create a new page then select this page above.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), '' . __("Usage:", "nextend-facebook-connect") . '')
printf(__('%1$s You won\'t be able to reach the selected page unless a social login/registration happens.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), '' . __("Important:", "nextend-facebook-connect") . '')
printf(__('Please visit to our %1$s to check what plugins are supported!', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'Login Restriction page')

printf(__('Set a custom label for the social buttons in registration forms and for shortcodes with %1$s parameter set to %2$s.
The register specific labels can be modified at the Buttons tab of each provider.
This option also allows the use of register specific %3$s options.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'labeltype', 'register', 'Custom Actions')

printf(__('%1$s The overlay won\'t be displayed if the %2$s setting is set to %3$s!', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), '' . __("Note:", "nextend-facebook-connect") . '', '' . __("Target window", "nextend-facebook-connect") . '', '' . __("Prefer same window", "nextend-facebook-connect") . '')
printf(__('Some %1$sproviders%2$s don\'t support embedded browsers.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), '', '')
printf(__('This setting defines if we should remove or disable the related buttons in WebView environments.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), '', '')

printf(__('Defines whether the registration with %1$s will send the same registration notification that %2$s does, instead of the %3$s default one.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'Nextend Social Login', 'WooCommerce', 'WordPress')
printf(__('Use the %s in your custom button\'s code to make the label show up.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), "{{label}}")
printf(__('Follow the guide at: %s', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), '' . $fixOAuthRedirectURLGuideUrl . '')
printf(__('I am done setting up my %s', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), $provider->getLabel() . ' ' . _x('App', 'Social Login App', 'nextend-facebook-connect'))

printf(__('To allow your visitors to log in with their %1$s account, first you must create an App for %1$s. The following guide will help you through the %1$s App creation process. After you have created your %1$s App, head over to "Settings" and configure the fields with the credentials of the App you created.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), $provider->getLabel())
printf(__('How to create an App for %s: ', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), $provider->getLabel())
printf(__('Follow the guide at: %s', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), '' . $gettingStartedGuideUrl . '')
printf(__('Default (The %1$s is: %2$s)', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), ' ' . __('default WordPress role', 'nextend-facebook-connect') . '', '' . $roles[$default_role] . '')
printf(__('This provider is currently disabled, which means that users can’t register or login via their %s account.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), $provider->getLabel())

printf(__('This provider works fine, but you can test it again. If you don’t want to let users register or login with %s anymore you can disable it.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), $provider->getLabel())
printf(__('This provider is currently enabled, which means that users can register or login via their %s account.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), $provider->getLabel())

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare('SELECT ID FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'social_users` WHERE type = %s AND identifier = %s', array(
            $this->dbID,
            $identifier
        )))

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare('SELECT identifier FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'social_users` WHERE type = %s AND ID = %s', array(
            $this->dbID,
            $user_id
        )))

$wpdb->query($wpdb->prepare('DELETE FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'social_users` WHERE type = %s AND ID = %d', array(
            $this->dbID,
            $user_id
        )))

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare('SELECT identifier FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'social_users` WHERE type LIKE %s AND ID = %d', array(
            $this->dbID,
            $current_user->ID
        )))

$wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare('SELECT identifier FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'social_users` WHERE type LIKE %s AND ID = %d', array(
            $this->dbID,
            $user_id
        )))
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = '" . DB_NAME . "' AND TABLE_NAME = '" . $table_name . "' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'social_users_id';")
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = '" . DB_NAME . "' AND TABLE_NAME = '" . $table_name . "' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'register_date';")
printf(__('%1$s allows HTTPS OAuth Redirects only. You must move your site to HTTPS in order to allow login with %1$s.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), $provider->getLabel())
printf(__('%1$s allows HTTPS OAuth Redirects only. You must move your site to HTTPS in order to allow login with %1$s.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'Facebook')
printf(__('If you are not sure what is your %1$s, please head over to Getting Started', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'App ID', $this->getUrl())
printf(__('By replacing your existing %1$s App, users with linked %1$s accounts will no longer be able to login with %1$s.', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'Facebook')
printf(__('If you are not sure what is your %1$s, please head over to Getting Started', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'Client ID', $this->getUrl())
printf(__('If you are not sure what is your %1$s, please head over to Getting Started', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'API Key', $this->getUrl())
printf(__('If you are not sure what is your %1$s, please head over to Getting Started', 'nextend-facebook-connect'), 'Client ID', $this->getUrl())
